title: SNDL Inc. Common Shares (SNDL) Earnings Report Dates & Earnings Forecasts
text: NASDAQ provides comprehensive earnings information for SNDL Inc. The platform offers historical earnings dates, earnings forecasts, and analyst estimates for the company. Key information includes upcoming earnings announcement dates, historical earnings per share results, revenue estimates, and analyst consensus ratings. SNDL has a Strong Buy consensus rating according to analyst evaluations. The average 12-month price target for SNDL is $5.71, with forecasts ranging from $5.05 to $6.51. Analysts forecast significant EPS growth for fiscal 2026 at $0.21 per share. NASDAQ data shows historical earnings surprises with SNDL frequently beating revenue expectations while missing EPS estimates in recent quarters. The platform enables tracking of quarterly earnings performance, allowing investors to compare actual results against forecasts.
